evidenceSummary.summary: /create:feature-catalog routes generation through sk-doc creation guidance and root/per-feature templates.
The intended sk-doc validation/test table taxonomy exposes Automated test and Manual playbook, not Integration or Manual scenario contract as Type values.
Create-feature-catalog validation checks root/link/count/section structure but not validation-table Type values or source-anchor correctness.
Create-command quality standards require CURRENT REALITY while current feature-file templates require HOW IT WORKS, creating a scaffolding contract mismatch.
